title: Verify Integration: Support chat redirection
description: Tests that the 'Support' option in the Trial Corner correctly redirects the user to the specified chat/WhatsApp support channel.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the target cohort.

steps.description: 3. Click on the 'Support' or 'Support Chat' button.

expected_result: The user is successfully redirected to the correct support chat application or webpage as configured.
